title: Kirill Kaprizov's contract vs. Minnesota Wild's salary cap
desc: The 2025/26 NHL season is underway, and it’s the perfect time to revisit Kirill Kaprizov’s record-breaking contract with the Minnesota Wild. Starting in 2026/27, his salary will jump to $17 million USD, making him the league’s highest-paid player.

title: NHL Empty-Net Shots & Goals (2007–2024) | Team & Player Trends, Stats, and Evolution
desc: Dive into NHL empty-net situations from 2007/08 to 2023/24. This video explores how teams and players react when the goalie is pulled—covering trends in shot attempts, success rates, and scoring leaders like Alex Ovechkin.

title: Sidney Crosby’s Shooting Performance in the 2022-23 season
desc: The video offers a detailed breakdown of Sidney Crosby’s shooting tendencies during the 2022–23 NHL season.

title: Players Shooting Performance
desc: This video offers a dynamic comparison of shooting performance among seven of the NHL’s most elite forwards: Alex Ovechkin, Evgeni Malkin, Patrick Kane, Leon Draisaitl, Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, and Sidney Crosby. Spanning 17 seasons from 2007 to 2024, the analysis dives into key metrics such as total shot attempts, shooting accuracy, goals per shot, and other advanced statistics.

title: Connor McDavid´s  Shooting Performance in the 2021-24 seasons
desc: This video showcases Connor McDavid’s shooting performance across the 2021 to 2024 NHL seasons, highlighting his evolution as one of hockey’s most electrifying talents. Through a compilation of goals, precision shots, and dynamic plays, viewers witness McDavid’s unmatched speed, puck control, and scoring instincts that have defined his dominance on the ice.

title: NHL Schedule Breakdown: Every Team's Remaining Games Before the End of the Regular Season 2025/26
desc: With 51 days left in the NHL regular season, we break down the remaining schedules for all 32 teams — home games, away games, game frequency, and what to expect before the Trade Deadline.
